Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Joseph S. May, Esq. appeared with petitioner Yazmin Duarte, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Emilio Perez, who as also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath but did not testify.
Stephen B. Halterbeck, Financial Advisor and Registered Settlement Planner at Robert W. Baird & Co., was placed under oath and testified.
Timothy Davis, Esq. appeared for defendant Mercy Housing California.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $267,498.00.
Attorney Fees - $66,874.50.
Medical Expenses - $556.51.
Costs - $11,455.07.

The net balance of $188,611.92 shall be used for the purchase of a structured settlement annuity that shall provide future benefits to the minor, with guaranteed lump sum payments when the minor reaches the ages of 18, 20, 22, 24 & 25.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to January 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 14 for Progress Report on the Status of the purchase of the structured settlement annuity.
